name: Lebanese Chicken (Frarej)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 500 degrees F.
2. Rinse 4 chicken breasts with skin and ribs in cold water.
3. Rub each chicken breast with half a teaspoon of salt.
4. Mix lemon juice from 3 large lemons, olive oil (3/4 cup), minced garlic cloves, sliced onions, and cook until the chicken is firm and does not ooze when poked with a fork. Baste the chicken breasts two or three times during cooking.
5. Place the prepared chicken into a 9x13 baking dish with the remaining potatoes, garlic, onion, and tomatoes.
6. Cover the dish and bake in the oven for 20 minutes.
7. Serve with pita bread. Each breast can be served with a helping of potatoes, some onions, and a tomato.
